lenses.guidance: vv 3-21's clean-and-unclean food list is echoed at Lev 11 and later relativized at Acts 10:9-16 (Peter's rooftop vision) and Mk 7:19 ('declared all foods clean'). The canonical line moves from boundary-marker to fulfilled boundary.

vv 3-21's dietary distinctions are the type — outward separation marking inward holiness — that Mk 7:19 names fulfilled. The shadow ordered Israel's body around covenant; the substance is now access through Christ.

vv 28-29 ground the third-year tithe in care for the foreigner, fatherless, and widow — worship is tied to social provision. To respond today is to let liturgy and largesse be one practice; the heart bends both.
